beIN SPORTS 5.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Liverpool - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
beIN SPORTS 5.desc: Wolves have met Liverpool in eight previous FA Cup ties and have a positive record against the Reds, progressing more often  than they’ve been eliminated. The last time they faced them in the fifth round was in 1948-49, winning 3-1 and eventually lifting that season’s trophy. This is the second time in the last five seasons that Liverpool with face the side bottom of the Premier League in the FA Cup fifth round – they won 2-1 against Norwich in 2021-22, who had knocked Wolves out in the fourth round.

beIN SPORTS 5.original_title: Mansfield Town vs Arsenal - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
beIN SPORTS 5.title: Mansfield Town vs Arsenal - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
beIN SPORTS 5.desc: This is the first meeting between Mansfield Town and Arsenal since January 1929, a match won 2-0 by Arsenal in the FA Cup. The Gunners have only had a bigger gap between games against Lincoln City  than this 97-year gap against the Stags. Arsenal have progressed from each of their last 15 FA Cup ties against sides from the third tier or below – the last side to knock them out was fourth tier Wrexham in the third round in 1991-92.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Mansfield Town vs Arsenal - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Mansfield Town vs Arsenal - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: This is the first meeting between Mansfield Town and Arsenal since January 1929, a match won 2-0 by Arsenal in the FA Cup. The Gunners have only had a bigger gap between games against Lincoln City  than this 97-year gap against the Stags. Arsenal have progressed from each of their last 15 FA Cup ties against sides from the third tier or below – the last side to knock them out was fourth tier Wrexham in the third round in 1991-92.

beIN SPORTS 2.original_title: Wrexham vs Chelsea - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
beIN SPORTS 2.title: Wrexham vs Chelsea - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 5
beIN SPORTS 2.desc: Wrexham and Chelsea haven’t met in any competition since February 1982 when the Welsh side won 1-0 in a league game, one of two wins Wrexham have registered in nine games against Chelsea. Chelsea have faced Wrexham in one previous FA Cup tie, needing two replays in the 1981-82 fourth round to knock them out. The Blues have won six of their last eight away games in Wales in all competitions, including a 3-1 win at Cardiff in the League Cup this season.
